compiled_state.title: Update validate-issues and orphaned-tasks tests to remove .tickets/*.md v2 fixtures
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Update test-validate-issues.sh and test-orphaned-tasks.sh to remove v2 .tickets/*.md YAML fixture writes. Replace with v3 event-sourced fixtures: write CREATE/STATUS JSON event files to a temp tickets-tracker directory and use the ticket reducer to serve data. validate-issues.sh script also needs to be updated (coordinate with story 12b9-45d8) or the test needs to mock the v3 data source. test-orphaned-tasks.sh Test 7/8 TICKETS_DIR pattern must be updated similarly. Depends on T7 guard (fe07-add4).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: validate-issues.sh migrated to ticket CLI
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
